description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: python-build, nix-flake, and generated-docs. The python-build job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.8 and 3.13, install the build module, and build the package. The nix-flake job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of derivations, install Nix, and build the derivations. The generated-docs job should run on ubuntu-latest, set up Python 3.13, regenerate generated docs, and compare them with the committed version.
